message:
feat(focus,modal): extend focus manager and modal integration from concurrent development

Continued work on the focus trap and modal coordination system from
parallel agent development:
- focus/manager.rs: additional focus group management methods and
  edge-case handling for trap state transitions (+33 lines)
- modal/focus_integration.rs: expanded modal focus coordinator with
  further return-focus retargeting logic, inactive modal validation,
  and focus repair after mid-stack removals (+121 lines)

These changes build on the earlier focus trap lifecycle hardening
commit (d240f48f) and represent the next iteration of the same
feature work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
